title: Chocolate Command Blocks
description: Just the Command Block Texture Changes from my Pack "Chocolate Minecraft"
body:
# Chocolate Command Blocks

_Have you ever been upset with the fact that Vanilla Command Blocks are off center and look Ugly?_
**So did i!, so i Fixed it!**

"Chocolate Command Blocks" is a small Resourcepack that aims to fix the Vanilla Command Block textures by centering them and giving them a small overall makeover.

_These changes all come from my much bigger Resourcepack called "Chocolate Minecraft" however since many people seemed to like my Command Block update and potentially might not like the other Changes made in "Chocolate Minecraft" i decided to turn just Command Blocks into its own seperate Resourcepack_

### Impulse Command Blocks
![An overview of the Chocolate Command Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3a4cd0e7e2b00fe57ccc040a7e488a81e350db.png)
